title: MenuGames
description: Adds Worm Game, Minesweeper, Battle City and Flappy Bird to the esc menu.
body:
[ENG]

Adds Worm Game, Minesweeper, Battle City and Flappy Bird to the esc menu. The games are simple and do not require any add-ons. If you encounter any problems or have any suggestions, please visit my Discord.
